_comment: Configuration for the daily ingestion job. Fill in real sources, then point scripts/ingest.js at this file.

website_monitors.name: 34th Ward Office website
website_monitors.watch_for: new newsletter archive entries, development/infrastructure page updates, business resources, community events
website_monitors.notes: Homepage is mostly navigation; freshest content arrives via the Conway's Corner email. Monitor for site updates the email misses.

editorial_rules.focus_on: local businesses, community news, events, city services, and anything that affects residents' daily lives
editorial_rules.avoid: highlighting or personalizing coverage around Ald. Bill Conway or any individual politician; keep attribution factual (source name only) and lead with the community impact, not the official

email_intake._comment: Recommend a dedicated inbox (e.g. news@34thward.com) subscribed to newsletters, kept separate from personal/work email.
email_intake.gmail_search_query: {from:bill@ward34.org from:illinoisplaybook@email.politico.com from:forecast@email.politico.com from:westloop.org from:info@indivisiblegwlchi.org from:wcachicago.org from:axios.com} newer_than:2d
expected_senders: info@wcachicago.org (The WCA Weekly - West Central Association Chamber of Commerce, Thursdays; skips holiday weeks - none expected week of July 4)
info@indivisiblegwlchi.org (Indivisible Greater West Loop - Weekly Action Plan, Mondays)
PENDING: Axios - no Axios emails found in this inbox; subscribe at axios.com/newsletters (e.g. Axios Chicago)

hold_for_review_if: mentions a named individual alongside an allegation, accusation, lawsuit, or dispute
content is unverifiable or contradicts a prior published item
source is not in the approved sender/feed list
